/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcudapipeline.so -o libcudapipeline.so @CMakeFiles/cudapipeline.dir/objects1.rsp CMakeFiles/cudapipeline.dir/cmake_device_link.o @CMakeFiles/cudapipeline.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/usr/local/cuda-11.4/targets/aarch64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-11.4/targets/aarch64-linux/lib"
